H.C. Wainwright maintains a Buy rating for Bitfarms $BITF but cuts the price target to $3.70. 

Rebranding today as $KEEL Keel Infrastructure, the firm is pivoting to HPC and AI with 478MW of U.S. capacity. Analysts see 2026 colocation deals as the key rerating catalyst.
